Catukkanipātapāḷi/205Mahāvagga/Bhaddiyas.text: Āvaṭṭanīmāyaṁ (Sī), āvaṭṭanimāyaṁ (Syā, Kaṁ, Ka) Ma 2. 38 piṭṭhepi passitabbaṁ.

Catukkanipātapāḷi/205Mahāvagga/Vappasutt.text: Viññūhīti (Sī, I, Ka) Saṁ 2. 520 piṭṭhe passitabbaṁ.

Catukkanipātapāḷi/205Mahāvagga/Sāḷhasutt.text: Syā-I-potthakesu “dubbaṇṇo ca hoti durupo supāpako”ti evamādinā pulliṅgikavasena dissati.

Catukkanipātapāḷi/205Mahāvagga/Mallikāde.text: Syā-I-potthakesu “dubbaṇṇo ca hoti durupo supāpako”ti evamādinā pulliṅgikavasena dissati.
Abhi 3. 163; Ma 2. 5; Dī 3. 194 piṭṭhesupi, heṭṭhā 300 piṭṭhepi.

Catukkanipātapāḷi/205Mahāvagga/Attantapa.text: Abhi 3. 163; Ma 2. 5; Dī 3. 194 piṭṭhesupi, heṭṭhā 300 piṭṭhepi.
( ) Natthi Sī-Syā-potthakesu. Ma 1. 239; Ma 2. 10 piṭṭhesu passitabbaṁ.

Catukkanipātapāḷi/205Mahāvagga/Taṇhāsutt.text: Evamasmi (Sī), evasmi (Syā, Kaṁ, I) Abhi 2. 406 piṭṭhepi passitabbaṁ.

Catukkanipātapāḷi/205Mahāvagga/Pemasutta.text: Na apajjhāyati (Sī), na pajjhāyati (Syā, Kaṁ, I)

Catukkanipātapāḷi/244Kammavagga/Saṁkhitt.text: Akaṇhaṁ asukkaṁ (Sī, Syā, I) (Dī 3. 192; Ma 2. 52 piṭṭhesupi)

Catukkanipātapāḷi/244Kammavagga/Vitthāra.text: Akaṇhaṁ asukkaṁ (Sī, Syā, I) (Dī 3. 192; Ma 2. 52 piṭṭhesupi)

Catukkanipātapāḷi/244Kammavagga/Samaṇasu.text: Samaṇehi aññeti (Sī, I, Ka) ettha aññehīti sakāya paṭiññāya saccābhiññehīti attho veditabbo. Dī 2. 125; Ma 1. 92 piṭṭhesupi.

Catukkanipātapāḷi/255Āpattibhayavagga/Āp.text: Na kareyya (Sī) Dī 1. 56 piṭṭhe Pāḷiyā tadaṭṭhakathāya ca saṁsandetabbaṁ.
